Home / Email List Revenue Calculator

Email List Revenue Calculator

Calculate how much revenue your email list generates per send, per month, and per year based on your funnel metrics.

Scenarios:

How to Use This Tool

1
Enter your current email subscriber count.
2
Enter your typical open rate (industry average is 20-30%).
3
Enter your click rate as a percentage of opens (typical is 2-5%).
4
Enter your conversion rate from clicks to purchases (typical is 1-3%).
5
Enter the average value of an order from your emails.
6
Scroll down to see revenue projections across 9 different list sizes.
7
tools.solopreneur-email-list-revenue-calculator.how_to_use.6
8
tools.solopreneur-email-list-revenue-calculator.how_to_use.7

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a good open rate for marketing emails?

20-30% is the industry average across all sectors. Niche audiences and highly engaged lists can reach 30-45%. If you are below 15%, clean your list of inactive subscribers (who have not opened in 90+ days) and improve subject lines. A smaller engaged list outperforms a large disengaged one.

How often should I email my list?

1-4 times per week is the sweet spot for most creators. Daily emails work for high-value niches like trading or breaking news but risk higher unsubscribes. Weekly is the minimum to stay top-of-mind. Test frequency by monitoring open rates and unsubscribe rates — if opens drop, send less frequently.

What affects click rate the most?

Relevance and placement. Emails with one clear CTA outperform those with multiple links. Personalize based on past behavior. Plain-text emails often get higher click rates than heavily designed templates because they feel more personal. The first link in an email typically gets 40-60% of all clicks.

How do I calculate revenue per subscriber?

Total annual email revenue divided by total subscribers. The benchmark is $1-$2/subscriber/year for most industries. Top performers reach $5-$20+. This is your single most important email KPI — it captures the health of your entire email monetization funnel.

What is the biggest mistake email marketers make?

Sending the same offer to everyone. Segmenting your list by purchase history, engagement level, and expressed interests can increase email revenue 3-10x. A new subscriber should receive a different sequence than someone who has purchased 3 times. Use tagging and automation to deliver the right offer to the right person at the right time.

Results

Copy All
Example

📧 Email List Revenue Calculator

📊 Funnel Metrics: • Subscribers: 10,000 • Open Rate: 25.0% → 2,500 opens • Click Rate: 5.0% → 125 clicks • Conversion Rate: 2.0% → 2.50 conversions • Avg Order Value: $50.00 • Emails/Month: 4 (industry avg 2-8) • Monthly Unsubscribes: ~0.5% (50/mo) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💰 Revenue Snapshot: • Revenue Per Send: $125.00 • Monthly Revenue: $500/mo • Annual Revenue: $6,000/yr • Per Subscriber (yr): $0.60/sub/yr • Per Subscriber (mo): $0.05/sub/mo • Per Send Per Sub: $0.0125 • Total Annual Conversions: 120 sales/yr ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📐 List Economics: • Revenue/Send: $125.00 • Revenue/1000 Opens: $50.00 • Revenue/1000 Clicks: $1000.00 • Click-to-Open Rate: 5.0% (CTOR — industry: 10-15%) • Revenue per Email: $125.00 (per send) • Industry Benchmark: $1-2/sub/yr baseline | $5-20/sub/yr top performers ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🩺 List Health: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • 🟡 Open rate 25.0% is on industry average. • 🟢 Click rate 5.0% is healthy. • 🟠 $$0.60/sub/yr — below benchmark. • 🟡 Unsub rate 0.5% — typical. 🎯 List Growth Projection: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Assuming 0.5% monthly churn and 10% monthly net growth: • Net monthly growth: 9.5% (10% new - 0.5% churn) • List in 6 months: 17,238 (compound) • List in 12 months: 29,715 • Revenue in 12 months: $17,829/yr (projected) • Net adds needed: 1,000 new subs/mo to sustain ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⚖️ Per-Sub Value Break-Even: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Current $/sub/yr: $0.60 • Industry target: $1-2/sub/yr (avg lists) • Top performer: $5-20/sub/yr • 🔴 Below $1/sub/yr — focus on segmentation + offer quality. • To hit $5K/yr: 8,333 engaged subscribers • To hit $50K/yr: 83,333 engaged subscribers ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔄 What-If Scenarios: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Raise open rate 2x: Annual $12,000 (better subject lines + send time) • Raise click rate 2x: Annual $12,000 (clearer CTAs + better content) • 2x subscribers: Annual $12,000 (lead magnets + list growth) • All combined: Annual $48,000 (max upside) • Send 2x more emails: Annual $12,000 (more touch points) 500 subs: $25.00/mo | $300/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 1,000 subs: $50.00/mo | $600/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 2,500 subs: $125.00/mo | $1,500/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 5,000 subs: $250.00/mo | $3,000/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 10,000 subs: $500.00/mo | $6,000/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 25,000 subs: $1250.00/mo | $15,000/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 50,000 subs: $2500.00/mo | $30,000/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 100,000 subs: $5000.00/mo | $60,000/yr | $0.60/sub/yr 250,000 subs: $12500.00/mo | $150,000/yr | $0.60/sub/yr
